## Meeting Purpose

[Interview and technical exercise with Dana Levine for a Product Engineer role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dana completed a coding exercise to build an article processing pipeline with AI-powered features](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai has built an internal workflow engine and infrastructure for AI-powered content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [The company is scaling rapidly but faces challenges in automating processes and managing growth](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5292.0)
  - [Dana's product and engineering background aligns well with GrowthX.ai's needs at this stage](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7504.0)

## Topics

### Coding Exercise

  - [Dana built a script to process articles, generate summaries, translate to Spanish, and extract fact-check items using AI APIs](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Implemented error handling, file output, and used template strings/Liquid for formatting](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Discussed potential improvements like separating logic, adding retries, and saving intermediate steps](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5288.0)

### GrowthX.ai Infrastructure

  - [Built internal workflow engine and scaffolding tools for AI-powered content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Uses abstraction layers on top of Temporal for task management and error handling](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5292.0)
  - [Generates code, prompts, and documentation from high-level workflow descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5292.0)
  - [Aiming to create a "cursor-like experience" for content creation team](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5292.0)

### Team Structure and Scaling

  - [Currently \~60 people on services team, aiming for $22M revenue this year](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5960.0)
  - [Organized into pods with directors, managing directors, and helpers](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5992.0)
  - [Facing challenges in training and optimizing human processes as they scale](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5292.0)
  - [Working on automating more of the workflow to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=5292.0)

### Engineering Approach

  - [Engineers expected to be close to the business and understand customer needs](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7362.0)
  - [No dedicated product managers - engineers take on product thinking](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7362.0)
  - [Emphasis on building empathy with users by shadowing/doing their work](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7557.0)
  - [Remote-first with option for office time in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7756.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to send Dana an offer and compensation details](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7883.0)
  - [Dana to provide professional references](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7877.0)
  - [Follow up next week to discuss offer and any remaining questions](https://fathom.video/share/gEhXJXsso9LGgqs5xveYkHoo8Qoin3fz?tab=summary&timestamp=7833.0)
